---
title: "Exploratory Data Analysis"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

## Job Postings by Industry

```{=html}
<iframe src="figures/job_postings_by_industry.html" width="100%" height="500px"></iframe>
```

## Salary Distribution by Industry

```{=html}
<iframe src="figures/salary_by_industry.html" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
```

## Remote vs. On-Site Jobs

```{=html}
<iframe src="figures/remote_vs_onsite.html" width="100%" height="500px"></iframe>
```

## Top 20 In-Demand Skills

```{=html}
<iframe src="figures/top_skills.html" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
```

## Top 15 Job Titles

```{=html}
<iframe src="figures/top_job_titles.html" width="100%" height="500px"></iframe>
```

## Salary by Job Title

```{=html}
<iframe src="figures/salary_by_title.html" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
```

## Job Postings by State

```{=html}
<iframe src="figures/job_postings_by_state.html" width="100%" height="500px"></iframe>
```
